contexts.context: ...appear: he became silent, and, ordering his <mark>helmet</mark> to be laced, they mounted their horses,...
...now presented themselves. First came a gentleman carrying the <mark>helmet</mark> and lance of Monseigneur de la Motte; twelve...
..., who in like manner carried the lances and <mark>helmets</mark> of their friends. Then, at fitting intervals,...
